title: Asperula kotschyana
taxonomy: Asperula kotschyana is a species within the genus Asperula and the family Rubiaceae. The genus Asperula is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as woodruffs or whortleberries. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, often referred to as the coffee or madder family. Asperula kotschyana is a member of the order Gentianales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the gentians and the coffee family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
